overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring the distinctive 'El Guapo' building and neon-lit streets. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-quality ray-traced reflections on wet pavement and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glass facade and digital advertising

events.description: El Guapo building with large cylindrical digital signage comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk beside a modern glass building, approaching a plaza intersection

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella standing near the railing on the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: modern glass and steel office building with illuminated interior windows
black metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
large digital billboard displaying a face with glasses and Japanese text
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet city sidewalk at night, flanked by a modern glass building on the left and metal railings on the right. The camera moves forward toward a plaza, with the distinctive El Guapo building becoming visible in the distance around the 6-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with cylindrical advertising building and crosswalks

events.description: turning left to navigate around the plaza intersection toward the hotel sign
vehicle passes by on the right side of the plaza

agents.ego_description: navigating through the open plaza, passing pedestrians with umbrellas and crossing the wet paved area

notable_agents.action: person holding an umbrella walking across the plaza from left to right

entered.detail: cylindrical building wrapped with large digital screens displaying 'EL GUAPO' logo
standalone digital advertising pillar with rotating displays
wide open paved plaza with crosswalk markings
large illuminated hotel sign with Japanese characters and 'HOTEL' text

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by the cylindrical El Guapo building covered in digital signage. The camera moves through the open area, passing pedestrians with umbrellas, while the hotel sign becomes visible in the distance. The ground consists of wet paved tiles reflecting the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone approaching highway overpass with hotel entrance

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the hotel entrance and under the overpass, passing orange safety barriers

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with support pillars spanning across the street
bright orange metal railings and barriers near the hotel entrance
large concrete planter containing a palm tree

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open plaza into a semi-covered area beneath a massive concrete overpass. The hotel sign is now prominent on the left, with orange safety barriers lining the right side. The environment becomes more enclosed as the camera approaches and enters the underpass area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street beneath overpass with red neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts to dominant red neon tones from signage on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrow street under the overpass, moving deeper into the enclosed urban canyon

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking away from camera deeper into the underpass

entered.detail: vertical digital billboards emitting intense red neon light
distant opening at the end of the underpass with visible city lights

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a narrow, enclosed street beneath the overpass. The lighting shifts to dominant red neon from signage on the right. The camera moves forward through the urban canyon, with the overpass structure now directly overhead, toward a distant opening where city lights are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city sidewalk into a claustrophobic urban canyon beneath a massive overpass. It begins by moving forward past a modern glass building and metal railings, gradually revealing the cylindrical El Guapo building as the path opens into a wide plaza. As the camera traverses the wet paved tiles among pedestrians with umbrellas, the scene shifts from the open expanse of the plaza toward a prominent hotel sign and orange safety barriers. The environment then becomes increasingly enclosed as the camera passes beneath a heavy concrete overpass, transitioning from the open night air into a semi-covered space. Finally, the lighting shifts to a dominant red neon glow as the camera pushes through a narrow street directly under the structure, moving toward a distant opening of city lights.
